race.comment: QUEEN PETA (5) looked awesome winning on debut at Cranbourne, smashing Blue Shield (favourite in R1) by four lengths in fast time on ground very similar to what she'll face here. She showed good early speed there which will suit this circuit and Childs draws for every chance. Fancy she remains unbeaten, especially now given the main danger has come out. Outside of her, BEAUTIFUL BEVY (7) was a dominant maiden winner on the synthetic first up and can convert that to turf with natural upside. CALL ME MAURA (8) is another off an easy synthetic win and has claims for the Tage Weir yard, look for her hitting the line late. TENNESSEE SONG (4) is racing well this time in and is through some good races, she should be thereabouts again.
